user.title: Add Speed Display
user.description: Connect a physical display or simulator through MQTT.

abort.already_configured: This MQTT topic prefix is already configured.

reset_stats.name: Reset statistics
reset_stats.description: Reset Speed Display counters and aggregated speed statistics.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID. If omitted, all Speed Display entries are reset.
